CustomField.description: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Enter any amounts listed on Lines 501, 503, or 506-509 that are NOT included in Total Payoff Amount of All Loans or Paid at Resale by Program.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter any amounts listed on Lines 501, 503, or 506-509 that are NOT included in Total Payoff Amount of All Loans or Paid at Resale by Program.
CustomField.label: Other Reductions to Amount Due Seller
